  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.7": "The request to check the citations centers on verifying reference accuracy, appropriate coverage, and proper attribution for claims made in the text.",
    "RX.1": "Citation review should transparently note any uncertainties or limitations in verifying sources or coverage.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid asserting definitive correctness or completeness of citations beyond what can be established.",
    "RX.3": "The work should remain confined to citation and scholarship checks without altering content or structure.",
    "RX.4": "Careful citation handling prevents misattribution or omission that could unfairly impact other researchers' work.",
    "RX.5": "Each claim should be traceable to specific, citable sources to maintain provenance and auditability."
  }
}

rationale.R1.7: The request to check the citations centers on verifying reference accuracy, appropriate coverage, and proper attribution for claims made in the text.
rationale.RX.1: Citation review should transparently note any uncertainties or limitations in verifying sources or coverage.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid asserting definitive correctness or completeness of citations beyond what can be established.
rationale.RX.3: The work should remain confined to citation and scholarship checks without altering content or structure.
rationale.RX.4: Careful citation handling prevents misattribution or omission that could unfairly impact other researchers' work.
rationale.RX.5: Each claim should be traceable to specific, citable sources to maintain provenance and auditability.
